query:
-- Update customers with realistic overseas furniture buyer names
UPDATE customers 
SET 
  companyName = CASE id
    WHEN 1 THEN 'ABC Furniture & Home Decor Inc.'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'European Living Solutions GmbH'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Pacific Home Furnishings Ltd.'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'Nordic Design House AB'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Australian Furniture Imports Pty Ltd'
    ELSE companyName
  END,
  contactPerson = CASE id
    WHEN 1 THEN 'John Smith'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Hans Mueller'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Michael Chen'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'Erik Johansson'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'David Wilson'
    ELSE contactPerson
  END,
  phone = CASE id
    WHEN 1 THEN '+1 (212) 555-0123'
    WHEN 2 THEN '+49 30 12345678'
    WHEN 3 THEN '+852 2345 6789'
    WHEN 4 THEN '+46 8 123 456 78'
    WHEN 5 THEN '+61 2 9876 5432'
    ELSE phone
  END,
  email = CASE id
    WHEN 1 THEN 'john.smith@abcfurniture.com'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'hans.mueller@europeanliving.de'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'michael.chen@pacifichome.hk'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'erik.johansson@nordicdesign.se'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'david.wilson@ausfurniture.com.au'
    ELSE email
  END,
  address = CASE id
    WHEN 1 THEN '123 Madison Avenue, Suite 500'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Friedrichstraße 95, 10117'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Unit 1205, Tower 2, Admiralty Centre'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'Storgatan 15, 114 55'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Level 8, 45 Clarence Street'
    ELSE address
  END,
  country = CASE id
    WHEN 1 THEN 'United States'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Germany'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Hong Kong'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'Sweden'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Australia'
    ELSE country
  END,
  region = CASE id
    WHEN 1 THEN 'New York, NY'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Berlin'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Hong Kong Island'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'Stockholm'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Sydney, NSW'
    ELSE region
  END
WHERE id IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5);
